specify.reviewerNotes: spec-reviewer APPROVED iter 2/5 after 5 blockers + 5 warnings + 2 suggestions resolved from iter 1. phase-reviewer APPROVED iter 1/5 with 2 warnings + 2 suggestions; all 4 applied. Total: 1 reviewer iteration cycle (iter 1 spec-rev + revision + iter 2 spec-rev verify + iter 1 phase-rev + revision). Spec ready for design.

design.reviewerNotes: design-reviewer APPROVED iter 2/5 after 4 blockers + 5 warnings + 2 suggestions in iter 1 (I-3 factual error fixed; C3b synthesized JOIN columns added; C2b engine-layer signature propagation added; TD-7 pytest.ini path dropped; C4b .meta.json schema bump added; TD-6 design-time measurement added; C6 walker construction specified; TD-3 re-verification added; C2 list_features_by_* default-behavior change documented; AC-11 _seed_v10_entities helper specified; Open Questions populated). phase-reviewer APPROVED iter 1/5 with 2 warnings + 2 suggestions, all explicitly plan-phase concerns: reconcile C2b vs handler-audit engine table, test-only db._conn exception note, update_entity capability pre-check, FR-5 sequencing. Carry-forward to plan tasks. Design ready for create-plan.

create-plan.reviewerNotes: 3-reviewer combined loop completed iter 3. Plan-reviewer APPROVED iter 2/5 (3 suggestions, all addressed iter 3). Task-reviewer APPROVED iter 3/5 (zero blockers; 2 suggestions: G.1 grep scope phrasing, G.2 conn cleanup). Phase-reviewer APPROVED iter 3/5 (2 warnings A.5/A.6 monkeypatch targets — both addressed in commit before complete; 2 suggestions G.1/E.9b clarity remain). Net: all blockers resolved across 3 iterations. Plan ready for implementation.

implement.reviewerNotes: FR-1/2/3/5/6/7 implemented; FR-4 partial (E.1 done, E.2/E.3 deferred to backlog #00390); 7 commits; regression 79/4193/3 vs baseline 80/4189/3 (+4 pass, -1 pre-existing fix, zero new regressions); qa-gate.json walks 41 ACs (35 pass, 3 partial, 3 deferred); bash-3.2 hook tests 114/114; AC-32 timing 0.0063s vs 2s budget.

finish.reviewerNotes: QA gate pass-after-fixes: 4 HIGH findings resolved inline (entity_engine workspace_uuid forwarding; AC-11 test name + 30s/2s gate; test_migration_11_stress_benchmark added; AC-4 skills/ sweep). 11 MED filed to backlog #00391-#00401. 8 LOW folded to .qa-gate-low-findings.md sidecar. security-reviewer APPROVED (2 LOW only).
